exploration_notes: Traced the complete CRD lifecycle across 4 sub-projects in the Kubernetes monorepo. Foundation layer (apimachinery): Scheme type registry, GVK/GVR types, TypeMeta/ObjectMeta, and Unstructured. Type definitions (apiextensions-apiserver/apis): internal hub types, external v1 types, conversion, and install. Server-side (apiextensions-apiserver): validation pipeline, CRD and CR etcd storage using genericregistry.Store (CRs stored as Unstructured), dynamic crdHandler serving /apis, structural schema
